2201 E Lake Shore Dr, Wilmington, NC 28401, USA

Small/medium patch of Blackberries/Dewberries next to parking area. Gets cut back every year so yield can be unpredictable. Good tasting fruit, but wear pants/long sleeves because lots of thorns. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: March-June.
Huge fig on the SW corner of Dock and 5th, easily accessible Falling Fruit season: July-unknown.
2155 E Lake Shore Dr, Wilmington, NC 28401, USA

There is a very well established muscadine wine climbing a tree (10-50+ ft up). Impossible to hand pick but would be a good spot to try to shake the vine with a cherry picker/long stick and have a tarp set out beneath. So many grapes come down in storms/hurric
